features.name: short_circuit_boolean_and_in_generate_conditional
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a genvar for loop and an if condition using && (boolean AND) short-circuit evaluation to guard array access
features.snippet: generate genvar g; for (g = 0; g < MAXSIZE; g = g + 1) begin:gfg if (g < ACTSIZE && MASK[g]) end endgenerate

features.name: short_circuit_bitwise_and_in_generate_conditional
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a genvar for loop and an if condition using & (bitwise AND) in a short-circuit-like evaluation pattern to guard array access
features.snippet: generate genvar g; for (g = 0; g < MAXSIZE; g = g + 1) begin:gfg if (g < ACTSIZE & MASK[g]) end endgenerate
